tasks.label: Tag and Track: Run Tests
tasks.command: dotnet-coverage collect "dotnet test ${workspaceFolder}/code/TagAndTrack/TagAndTrack.Tests/TagAndTrack.Tests.csproj --no-build --verbosity normal" --output ${workspaceFolder}/TestResults/coverage.cobertura.xml --output-format cobertura; reportgenerator -reports:${workspaceFolder}/TestResults/coverage.cobertura.xml -targetdir:${workspaceFolder}/TestResults/CoverageReport -reporttypes:TextSummary; Get-Content ${workspaceFolder}/TestResults/CoverageReport/Summary.txt

tasks.label: Tag and Track: Build & Run Tests
